description: Automated dependency management service that continuously monitors research software dependencies for security vulnerabilities and updates, maintaining software security and reducing technical debt for long-term sustainability.
name: Dependabot

indicators.Security: measures Security by continuously monitoring dependencies for known vulnerabilities and automatically proposing updates to mitigate risks.
indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by automating dependency updates, reducing technical debt, and ensuring software remains up to date with minimal manual effort.

useCases: Automatically detect and fix vulnerable dependencies in CI/CD pipelines
Keep software dependencies up to date with minimal manual intervention
Reduce technical debt by regularly updating outdated libraries
Improve software security posture through continuous dependency monitoring
